mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 6.5% over 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or unemployment declines persist without corresponding equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in GDP (GDPC1) and rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicate stagflationary pressures, causing equity valuations to contract through both earnings and discount rate channels, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined GDPC1/CPIAUCSL signal drops below 0.05, or 20-day returns show positive correlation with stagflation indicators.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monetary tightening (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) during high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3% YoY) creates a restrictive environment that depresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods with FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL > 3% YoY, or inflation-adjusted earnings growth exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects expanding manufacturing activity, improving corporate margins, and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO signal drops below 0.02, or 5-day returns show negative correlation with industrial production trends.

mechanism_narrative: A significant decline in housing starts (HOUST) below 800k signals weak demand for construction, reducing corporate revenues and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or housing starts recover without equity gains.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and rising unemployment (UNRATE) indicates labor market mismatch, creating earnings uncertainty and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS/UNRATE interaction drops below 0.03, or 20-day returns show positive correlation with labor market divergence.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in GDP (GDPC1) and retail sales (RSAFS) indicate weakening consumer demand, reducing corporate revenues and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1/RSAFS signal drops below 0.04, or 60-day returns show positive correlation with demand indicators.
